Matrix profile config persistence was reachable from operator.write message tools.

## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw`
- Ecosystem: npm
- Affected versions: `< 2026.4.10`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.4.10`

## Impact

Gateway `operator.write` message-tool paths could reach Matrix profile persistence that should have required admin-level authority.

## Technical Details

The fix gates Matrix profile updates for non-owner message-tool runs and prevents write-scoped callers from mutating persistent profile config.

## Fix

The issue was fixed in #62662. The first stable tag containing the fix is `v2026.4.10`, and `openclaw@2026.4.14` includes the fix.

## Fix Commit(s)

- `fe0f686c9228fffcec6de4011da45e69a6e23e54`
- PR: #62662

## Release Process Note

Users should upgrade to `openclaw` 2026.4.10 or newer. The latest npm release, `2026.4.14`, already includes the fix.

## Credits

Thanks to @zpbrent and @zsxsoft, with sponsorship from @KeenSecurityLab and @qclawer for reporting this issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00295, "percentile": 0.20967}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-7jp6-r74r-995q", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-17T22:15:27Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7jp6-r74r-995q", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-7jp6-r74r-995q"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42433"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-05T12:16:17Z", "published_at": "2026-04-17T22:15:27Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-7jp6-r74r-995q", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/62662", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42433", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/fe0f686c9228fffcec6de4011da45e69a6e23e54", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-unauthorized-matrix-profile-config-persistence-access-via-operator-write-message-tools", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7jp6-r74r-995q"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-7jp6-r74r-995q", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Matrix profile config persistence was reachable from operator.write message tools", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-08T01:32:26Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-7jp6-r74r-995q", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.10", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.4.10"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw: Matrix profile config persistence was reachable from operator.write message tools
